aboutData.title: Hi There! I'm Eddie De Meira
aboutData.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer
aboutData.text: I am a Software Engineer with focus on coding, project management, systems engineering, A.I. integration, SCADA systems, simulation, documentation, system's architecture design, requirements management, real-time data processing, and mission-critical applications.

details.title: CMSP
details.info: Certified Modeling & Simulation Professional by NTSA

details.title: ITCP
details.info: Information Technology Certified Professional by CIPS

services.title: System Architecture Design
services.text: Design a scalable and modular system architecture that separates concerns across data acquisition, processing, and user interaction layers.

services.title: A.I. Integration
services.text: Integrate real-time data pipelines with intelligent components (e.g., AI/ML agents) to enable adaptive decision-making and system responsiveness.

services.title: Coding
services.text: Ensure reliability, security, and interoperability by leveraging standardized protocols, and extensible interfaces.

services.title: Project Management
services.text: Plan, execute, and monitor projects using structured methodologies to ensure delivery on time, within scope, and on budget.

services.title: Leadership
services.text: Coordinate cross-functional teams, manage risks, and adapt to changing requirements in dynamic environments.

services.title: Systems Engineering
services.text: Coordinate multidisciplinary teams to align technical solutions with operational needs and stakeholder objectives.

skillData.title: All the skills that I have in that field of work are mentioned.
skillData.text: With over 10 years of experience in the field, I have developed a diverse skill set that encompasses various aspects of software engineering, project management, and systems design. My expertise includes coding, system architecture design, A.I. integration, real-time data processing, and leadership in managing complex projects. I am proficient in multiple programming languages and frameworks, and I have a strong background in developing scalable and modular systems that meet the needs of mission-critical applications.

Dr. Andrea Lima Pardini
informations.text: I feel privileged to know Eddie and to have witnessed firsthand his impressive combination of technical expertise, project leadership, and creative problem-solving skills.

informations.title: James Keogh
informations.text: I have worked with Eddie in the past so I can write this with complete honesty. Eddie is one of the most learned people I have ever met. His thirst for knowledge is unquenchable.

informations.title: Daniel Bergeron
informations.text: Eddie has shown a lot of initiative and drive while holding a position of virtual simulation lead for the Royal Canadian Navy. He is absolutely organized and focus in what he does and I highly recommend him as a true professional.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.subTitle: ADGA Group Consultants Inc.
experience.text: Developed C# applications and Unity 3D simulations, integrating physics, AI navigation, and UI systems for complex training environments.

experience.title: Program Analyst
experience.subTitle: ADGA Group Consultants Inc.
experience.text: Designed and implemented simulation systems using Java/JavaFX, focusing on interoperability and real-time visualization.

experience.title: SCADA Analyst
experience.subTitle: Bombardier Transportation Inc.
experience.text: Developed SCADA and train monitoring systems using C#, OPC, and ICONICS, supporting complex railway operations and automation.

experience.title: Site Manager
experience.subTitle: Transformix Engineering Inc.
experience.text: Managed international engineering projects, coordinating cross-border teams, budgets, and project schedules.

experience.title: Instrumenation Technician
experience.subTitle: Research In Motion (RIM)
experience.text: Maintained and calibrated electronic instrumentation while ensuring ISO-compliant quality control and system accuracy.

experience.title: Field Technician
experience.subTitle: The Pressure Pipe Inspection Company (PPIC)
experience.text: Performed field inspections and technical support for pipeline systems, ensuring operational integrity.

experience.title: Robotics Technician & Automation Lead
experience.subTitle: Hendrickson Springs Inc.
experience.text: Led automation and robotics maintenance, overseeing production systems and technical teams.

education.title: MSc Computing and Information Systems
education.subTitle: Athabasca University
education.text: Thesis research on AI-driven multi-agent system for early wildfire detection and response, leveraging real-time data processing and adaptive decision-making to enhance wildfire management strategies.

education.title: Precision Mechanics Engineering Technology
education.subTitle: SENAI Suico-Brasileiro
education.text: Diploma in Precision Mechanics Engineering Technology with a focus on CNC programming, precision machining, and quality control, providing a strong foundation in manufacturing processes and mechanical design principles.

contactData.title: Contact Info
contactData.subTitle: Visite my social profile and get connected
contactData.text: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions. Let's build something amazing together.
